name: Pantera Minerals Limited
description: Pantera Minerals Limited (ASX: PFE) is a U.S.-focused strategic metals company dedicated to targeting critical supply-chain minerals that are essential for defense, energy, and industrial security. The company focuses on identifying and developing overlooked, underexplored, and mispriced resource opportunities, particularly within the United States. By leveraging structural advantages and securing large land positions on private property, Pantera aims to unlock significant resource value. Their flagship efforts include the Gilham Silver-Antimony Project in Arkansas, which aligns with U.S. federal policy priorities to reduce import dependency and strengthen domestic supply chains for critical minerals.
